commands.review_summary:
The PR switches managed update handoff helper and updater processes to the durable temp handoff directory, adds an early `isMainModule` cwd fallback, regression tests, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was run in this read-only review. The linked production log plus current-main source make the failing path source-reproducible, but the macOS LaunchAgent sequence still needs real proof.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer real macOS LaunchAgent proof before merge; I found no narrow automatable code repair to queue.

target.title: fix(update): harden managed handoff cwd
target.body:
## Summary
- run managed service update helper and updater processes from the handoff temp directory instead of the package root
- make the early isMainModule startup guard tolerate ENOENT/uv_cwd when the process cwd has disappeared
- add regression coverage for both the handoff cwd and early startup cwd fallback paths

## Verification
- pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/gateway/server-methods/update-managed-service-handoff.ts src/gateway/server-methods/update-managed-service-handoff.test.ts src/infra/is-main.ts src/infra/is-main.test.ts CHANGELOG.md
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-methods/update-managed-service-handoff.test.ts src/infra/is-main.test.ts src/cli/update-cli/update-command.test.ts
- git diff --check

## Not Run
- Live macOS LaunchAgent managed-update smoke; this environment is Linux and cannot exercise launchd.

Fixes openclaw/openclaw#83808
target.author: jason-allen-oneal
